description: Linux launch commands and environment variables per game

schema.name: str — Game name for human reference
schema.env_vars: object — Environment variables as key-value pairs
schema.notes_en: str — English notes on Linux-specific configuration
schema.notes_es: str — Spanish notes on Linux-specific configuration

games.name: Alan Wake 2
games.launch_options: Works flawlessly using Gallium Nine standalone (no glitches or corrupted textures/ilumination). As previously mentioned, "DXVK_HUD=1 %command%
games.notes_en: The game can be played on Linux using Proton-GE, but no native support
games.notes_es: El juego se puede jugar en Linux utilizando Proton-GE, pero no hay soporte nativo

protondb_configs.notes: Game took a few tries to start and when it did, was able to run the game on high with the PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% and a PS4 controller. I am marking this down due to the issues in launching the game and mouse movement causing minor shuddering and drop in FPS while a controller with gyro was fine.
protondb_configs.launch_options: Game took a few tries to start and when it did, was able to run the game on high with the PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%

protondb_configs.notes: Game works perfectly with "PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%" launch option. Without it there are graphical glitches.
I am running the epic store's version of game. Initially there were many audio issue. Which i was able to solve by the DXVK_HUD command and changing the Vulkan icd loader to amd.json.
Takes 2-5 retries to start the game. Runs perfectly with d9vk; no more graphical glitches/crashes even the cutscenes-audio works.
I have the latest Proton 4.2-9 but it doesn't even start with it. Just change to 3.16-9 and it should run fine.

games.name: A Plague Tale: Requiem
games.notes_en: Game works on Linux with Proton Experimental, but some issues reported with ray tracing and crashes
games.notes_es: El juego funciona en Linux con Proton Experimental, pero se informan algunos problemas con ray tracing y bloqueos

games.name: AMID EVIL
games.notes_en: Game freezes if not capped at 60 fps on Linux with Proton Experimental
games.notes_es: El juego se bloquea si no se limita a 60 fps en Linux con Proton Experimental

games.name: ARC Raiders
games.notes_en: Game works on Linux with Proton, some users reported issues that can be fixed with specific launch options or environment variables
games.notes_es: El juego funciona en Linux con Proton, algunos usuarios informaron problemas que se pueden solucionar con opciones de lanzamiento o variables de entorno específicas

games.name: Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora
games.notes_en: The game plays well on Linux with HDR turned off and custom Proton: Proton-CachyOS
games.notes_es: El juego funciona bien en Linux con HDR desactivado y Proton personalizado: Proton-CachyOS

games.name: Avowed
games.notes_en: Game works on Linux through Steam using Proton, some users report performance issues
games.notes_es: El juego funciona en Linux a través de Steam utilizando Proton, algunos usuarios informan problemas de rendimiento

games.name: Battlefield V
games.notes_en: Battlefield V runs on most Linux systems with Proton Experimental, but may have issues
games.notes_es: Battlefield V se ejecuta en la mayoría de los sistemas Linux con Proton Experimental, pero puede tener problemas

games.name: Blind Fate: Edo no Yami
games.notes_en: The game works well under Proton 7.0rc3-GE-1, but some videos may have color bars due to a codec issue
games.notes_es: El juego funciona bien con Proton 7.0rc3-GE-1, pero algunos videos pueden tener barras de color debido a un problema de codec

games.name: Bright Memory
games.notes_en: The game runs with Proton 3.16-4 but has issues with microfreezes and resolution support. Some users reported success with Wine.
games.notes_es: El juego se ejecuta con Proton 3.16-4 pero tiene problemas con microcongelamientos y soporte de resolución. Algunos usuarios informaron éxito con Wine.

protondb_configs.notes: Runs fine out of the box, running mesa with the new ACO compiler (version 19.2.0_devel.113855.7157929d52c-1 as of writing)

maxed graphics, vsync on and fps stayed at 60 for most of the time. ocassional drops to about 40 when a lot of action was going on. also didnt experience any graphical glitches at all. played about 30 minutes and everything worked like a charm. running on opensuse tumbleweed
played it from start to finish, worked the whole way through
Runs great with no tweaks.
There's a lot of stutter between short cut scenes, of which there are many. And it appears vsync doesn't work, when enabled. Still perfectly playable, if you don't mind a little stutter.

games.name: Bright Memory: Infinite
games.notes_en: Game has issues running on Linux with Proton, may require unofficial Proton versions or patches
games.notes_es: El juego tiene problemas al ejecutarse en Linux con Proton, puede requerir versiones no oficiales de Proton o parches

games.name: Call of Duty: Black Ops Cold War
games.notes_en: The game can be played on Linux using Proton Experimental, but it may result in a permanent ban. The Ricochet anti-cheat does not work on Linux
games.notes_es: El juego se puede jugar en Linux utilizando Proton Experimental, pero puede resultar en una prohibición permanente. El anti-trampa Ricochet no funciona en Linux

games.name: Chorus
games.notes_en: Game is fully playable with Proton 5.13, but no information about anti-cheat compatibility
games.notes_es: El juego es completamente jugable con Proton 5.13, pero no hay información sobre la compatibilidad de anti-trampas

games.name: Control
games.notes_en: Control Ultimate Edition works on Steam Proton with specific launch options and Proton version 7.0-4
games.notes_es: Control Ultimate Edition funciona en Steam Proton con opciones de lanzamiento y versión de Proton 7.0-4 específicas

games.name: Cronos: The New Dawn
games.notes_en: The game has a native Linux version, but using Proton can provide better upscaling. Some users reported performance issues and video artifacts.
games.notes_es: El juego tiene una versión nativa de Linux, pero usar Proton puede proporcionar una mejor escalabilidad. Algunos usuarios informaron problemas de rendimiento y artefactos de video.

games.name: Crysis 2 Remastered
games.notes_en: The game can be played on Linux using Proton, but there may be issues with ray tracing and performance
games.notes_es: El juego se puede jugar en Linux utilizando Proton, pero puede haber problemas con el trazado de rayos y el rendimiento

games.name: Crysis 3 Remastered
games.notes_en: The game runs out of the box via Proton on Linux thanks to Proton 5.0-9 adding Origin fixes
games.notes_es: El juego se ejecuta fuera de la caja a través de Proton en Linux gracias a que Proton 5.0-9 agrega correcciones de Origin

games.name: A Plague Tale: Requiem
games.notes_en: The game has a black/transparent window issue on Linux, and some users have reported stuttering. The game may not launch if the machine is at or below the system requirements.
games.notes_es: El juego tiene un problema de ventana negra/transparente en Linux, y algunos usuarios han informado intermitencia. El juego puede no arrancar si la máquina está a o por debajo de los requisitos del sistema.

games.name: ARC Raiders
games.notes_en: Proton Experimental is required for stable performance. Some users experience performance issues compared to Windows.
games.notes_es: Se requiere Proton Experimental para un rendimiento estable. Algunos usuarios experimentan problemas de rendimiento en comparación con Windows.

games.name: AMID EVIL
games.notes_en: AMID EVIL works great in Proton, flawless OOB on Steam Deck.
games.notes_es: AMID EVIL funciona perfectamente en Proton, sin problemas OOB en Steam Deck.

protondb_configs.notes: Runs perfectly with no tweaking neccesary
With the latest Proton version, I've experienced zero issues running this game. Graphics, sound, etc all behave as I expected and it performs well, even with frantic combat going on.

Use Launch Options: "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 DefaultLimitNOFILE=1048576 %command%". 

Works fine on low and medium graphics settings. Above that, hard freezes can occur. With my setup, I average ~90 FPS in hallways, and ~60 FPS in combat (on medium graphics) so performance is fine to me. More importantly, I saw little difference between medium and epic graphics, so unless you really want the state of the art lighting effects ,the game works fine on medium.
Great permormance out of the box, 180-200fps on high settings, working perfectly with my 144hz monitor. No issues found at all.

F&CKING PLATINUM.

Game runs on EPIC, straight out of box. Not only no tweaks were required but also the game is great.

games.name: Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora
games.notes_en: The game works perfectly through Heroic Games Launcher and using GE-Proton8-25. However, a bug where the game wants to authenticate with Ubisoft's launcher, fails, and then asks you for a product key has been reported.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona perfectamente a través del lanzador de juegos Heroic y utilizando GE-Proton8-25. Sin embargo, se ha informado un bug donde el juego quiere autenticarse con el lanzador de Ubisoft, falla y luego te pide una clave de producto.

games.name: Bleak Faith: Forsaken
games.notes_en: The user can optionally force use of Proton for a specific game, even if a Linux version already exists.
games.notes_es: El usuario puede forzar opcionalmente el uso de Proton para un juego específico, incluso si ya existe una versión de Linux.

games.name: Bright Memory: Infinite
games.notes_en: The game may freeze in cutscenes or display a white screen, but can be made playable with certain launch options.
games.notes_es: El juego puede congelarse en las escenas de corte o mostrar una pantalla blanca, pero se puede hacer jugable con ciertas opciones de inicio.

games.name: Chernobylite 2: Exclusion Zone
games.notes_en: Install from Lutris on Proton. Click to launch the game, which will start the Steam install. In the games properties on Steam, force compatibility to Proton GE.
games.notes_es: Instale desde Lutris en Proton. Haga clic para lanzar el juego, que iniciará la instalación de Steam. En las propiedades del juego en Steam, fuerce la compatibilidad a Proton GE.

games.name: Crysis 2 Remastered
games.notes_en: Running Crysis Remastered on Linux turned into a deep dive into broken settings, stubborn FPS locks, odd fullscreen behavior, and baffling stutters.
games.notes_es: Ejecutar Crysis Remasterizado en Linux se convirtió en una búsqueda profunda en configuraciones rotas, bloqueos de FPS obstinados, comportamiento de pantalla completa extraño y estupideces de estallidos.

games.name: Crysis Remastered
games.notes_en: Running Crysis Remastered on Linux turned into a deep dive into broken settings, stubborn FPS locks, odd fullscreen behavior, and baffling stutters.
games.notes_es: Ejecutar Crysis Remastered en Linux se convirtió en una búsqueda profunda en configuraciones rotas, bloqueos de FPS obstinados, comportamiento de pantalla completa extraño y estupideces de estutters.

games.name: Dead Space

env_vars.DXVK_FRAME_RATE: 1 digit less than your screens refresh rate

games.notes_en: To launch the game on Steam Deck or Linux, set the game's compatibility tool to Proton Experimental in the Steam properties.
games.notes_es: Para lanzar el juego en Steam Deck o Linux, establezca la herramienta de compatibilidad del juego en Proton Experimental en las propiedades de Steam.

games.name: Deathloop
games.notes_en: Deathloop now appears to work fine with ray tracing, as does Resident Evil: Village (though the difference with turning on the flashy effects is apparently not as noticeable).
games.notes_es: Deathloop ahora parece funcionar bien con ray tracing, al igual que Resident Evil: Village (aunque la diferencia con encender los efectos brillantes no es tan notoria).

games.name: Deliver Us Mars
games.notes_en: The game runs fine and without any issues. Performance and stability has significantly improved over older proton versions.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona correctamente y sin problemas. La estabilidad y rendimiento han mejorado significativamente sobre versiones de proton más antiguas.

games.name: Delta Force
games.notes_en: Delta Force works on Linux with some issues, requires Proton and launch options.
games.notes_es: Delta Force funciona en Linux con algunos problemas, requiere Proton y opciones de lanzamiento.

games.name: Dragon Age: The Veilguard
games.notes_en: The game performs quite well on Steam Deck, and the default settings are too conservative.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona bastante bien en Steam Deck, y los ajustes predeterminados son demasiado conservadores.

games.name: Dying Light 2 Stay Human
games.notes_en: The game works well on Linux without any messing around.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona bien en Linux sin necesidad de hacer nada.

games.name: Dying Light: The Beast
games.notes_en: Works on Proton, but may require FSR4 upgrade. See https://steamcommunity.com/app/3008130/discussions/0/599663989456457058/ for more info.
games.notes_es: Funciona en Proton, pero puede requerir la actualización de FSR4. Consulte https://steamcommunity.com/app/3008130/discussions/0/599663989456457058/ para obtener más información.

games.name: EVE Online
games.notes_en: Enabling PROTON_LOG and PROTON_USE_WINED3D has fixed compatibility issues for some users. Using Proton-6.14-GE-2 has also been recommended.
games.notes_es: Habilitar PROTON_LOG y PROTON_USE_WINED3D ha resuelto problemas de compatibilidad para algunos usuarios. Usar Proton-6.14-GE-2 también se ha recomendado.

protondb_configs.notes:
Played 300h it just works.
For some reason if I have 2 clients side by side on my 4k screen the PC freezes after a while, but having 4 clients, one in each corner works perfect.
I have weird issues like that in other games too, I'm just a linux noob, maybe my system is not configured correctly
Nothing needed, works perfectly, very good performance.
Nothing needed, works great.
It runs perfect but if i play in windowed mode the game starts to going bad with a lot of lag
I thinks it works well

games.name: Everspace 2
games.notes_en: Everspace 2 works on Linux with Proton, but may require setting dx11 in Steam launch options.
games.notes_es: Everspace 2 funciona en Linux con Proton, pero puede requerir configurar dx11 en opciones de lanzamiento de Steam.

games.name: F1 2021
games.notes_en: F1 2021 works with Proton Experimental and -force-d3d11 launch option.
games.notes_es: F1 2021 funciona con Proton Experimental y el lanzamiento de opción -force-d3d11.

games.name: F1 23
games.notes_en: Proton for Linux include the ability to run many games that were previously only available for Windows, thanks to compatibility with the Wine library and Proton technology.
games.notes_es: Proton para Linux incluye la capacidad de ejecutar muchos juegos que anteriormente solo estaban disponibles para Windows, gracias a la compatibilidad con la biblioteca Wine y la tecnología Proton.

games.name: Far Cry 6
games.notes_en: Far Cry 6 works on Linux with Proton, but some users may need to set launch options or environment variables.
games.notes_es: Far Cry 6 funciona en Linux con Proton, pero algunos usuarios pueden necesitar establecer opciones de lanzamiento o variables de entorno.

games.name: Five Nights At Freddy's: Security Breach
games.notes_en: The game runs perfectly fine on Linux when using proton.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona perfectamente en Linux cuando se utiliza proton.

games.name: Forspoken
games.notes_en: To run it on desktop Linux, you can either load launch Steam directly with "-steamdeck" or by setting "SteamDeck=1 %command%" as a launch option. Enable FSR3 Frame Generation in graphics settings to remove screen flickering.
games.notes_es: Para ejecutarlo en Linux de escritorio, puedes cargar Steam directamente con "-steamdeck" o establecer "SteamDeck=1 %command%" como opción de lanzamiento. Habilita la generación de marcos FSR3 en las opciones de gráficos para eliminar el parpadeo de pantalla.

games.name: Forza Horizon 5
games.notes_en: Forza Horizon 5 on Linux is fundamentally solid with a ProtonDB Tier of Gold.
games.notes_es: Forza Horizon 5 en Linux es fundamentalmente sólido con un nivel de oro de ProtonDB.

games.name: Forza Motorsport
games.notes_en: Forza Motorsport works on Linux with GE-Proton9.23-1. Some users have reported issues with the game crashing or not launching.
games.notes_es: Forza Motorsport funciona en Linux con GE-Proton9.23-1. Algunos usuarios han informado problemas con el juego que se cae o no se inicia.

games.name: FragPunk
games.notes_en: FragPunk works on Linux with Proton GE, and some users have reported issues with anti-cheat.
games.notes_es: FragPunk funciona en Linux con Proton GE, y algunos usuarios han informado problemas con anti-cheat.

games.name: Ghostwire: Tokyo
games.notes_en: The game works on Linux with GE-Proton 7-8, but some users have issues with Proton Experimental.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona en Linux con GE-Proton 7-8, pero algunos usuarios tienen problemas con Proton Experimental.

games.name: Gori: Cuddly Carnage
games.notes_en: Gori: Cuddly Carnage is Proton compatible on Linux via Windows PC, with GPU Driver:4.6 (Compatibility Profile) Mesa 22.2.0 (git-17e5312102) GPU:AMD Custom GPU 0405.
games.notes_es: Gori: Cuddly Carnage es compatible con Proton en Linux a través de Windows PC, con GPU Driver:4.6 (Perfil de compatibilidad) Mesa 22.2.0 (git-17e5312102) GPU:AMD Custom GPU 0405.

games.name: Grand Theft Auto V Enhanced
games.notes_en: Proton Experimental adds fixes for GTA V Enhanced. Proton 10.0 beta brings enhanced game compatibility and fixes to Steam Deck and Linux.
games.notes_es: Proton Experimental agrega correcciones para GTA V Enhanced. Proton 10.0 beta trae compatibilidad de juegos mejorada y correcciones para Steam Deck y Linux.

games.name: Gray Zone Warfare
games.notes_en: The game works fine on Linux with Proton, but players get booted out after a few seconds due to EAC. Verify game files in Steam to fix some issues.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona bien en Linux con Proton, pero los jugadores se desbanan después de unos segundos debido a EAC. Verificar archivos de juego en Steam para solucionar algunos problemas.

games.name: Gungrave G.O.R.E
games.notes_en: Gungrave G.O.R.E works on Linux with Proton, and the game's stuttering issue can be fixed by adding -d3d11 to the Steam launch options.
games.notes_es: Gungrave G.O.R.E funciona en Linux con Proton, y el problema de estancamiento del juego se puede solucionar agregando -d3d11 a las opciones de inicio de Steam.

games.name: HITMAN World of Assassination
games.notes_en: The game runs perfectly out of the box without any compatibility settings. Some bits of the game may have issues.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona perfectamente sin ajustes de compatibilidad. Algunos fragmentos del juego pueden tener problemas.

games.name: Halo Infinite
games.notes_en: Halo Infinite works on Linux with Proton 10.0-3, but may require Proton 9.0 beta for multiplayer.
games.notes_es: Halo Infinite funciona en Linux con Proton 10.0-3, pero puede requerir Proton 9.0 beta para multijugador.

games.name: Hell Pie
games.notes_en: Some users reported issues with the game, but no clear solution was found.
games.notes_es: Algunos usuarios reportaron problemas con el juego, pero no se encontró una solución clara.

games.name: Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice
games.notes_en: Works on Linux with Proton, Platinum rating on ProtonDB
games.notes_es: Funciona en Linux con Proton, calificación de platino en ProtonDB

protondb_configs.notes: Works very well, only  crashed 3 times from during 10 hours of gameplay.

the game runs ok but it's more like a console like experience compared to windows. On windows I get over 50 fps and with proton I get about 30 fps . It's ok it's playable for me because the combat were you need some reflexes is not that frantic.

Due to the fact that "Gold" means, that the game works after tweaks, I am using "Platinum" rank.
It does have some stuttering going on when loading new environments. Though it doesn't happen often.
The game runs smooth so far, with no crashes or problems, other than those already mentioned.
Fully completed without issues. Audio out of sync is a problem in Windows as I have read in some reviews of the game

Works perfectly out of the box with decent performance. I don't know how it compares to Windows, but I got 65-100fps on max settings with my OCed RTX 2080S on 1440p. There was a bit of stuttering in the beginning, but it went away after about 10 minutes of playing.

games.name: ICARUS
games.notes_en: Use Proton Experimental and ensure you have the latest mesa. See https://www.reddit.com/r/ICARUS/comments/1ofjmjs/icarus_on_linux_awful_performance_fedora_and/ for more information.
games.notes_es: Utilice Proton Experimental y asegúrese de tener la última mesa. Consulte https://www.reddit.com/r/ICARUS/comments/1ofjmjs/icarus_on_linux_awful_performance_fedora_and/ para obtener más información.

games.name: Infinity Nikki
games.anticheat: Anti-cheat prevents launching after update, delete the anti-cheat folder and verify game integrity in steam and it should launch properly.
games.anticheat_linux: Anti-cheat blocks it working on Desktop Linux.
games.notes_en: The Demo of NFSU2 on UE5 is fully compatible with Linux on Wine/Proton, I'm running it under Bottles with no issues on ProtonGE 9-25.
games.notes_es: El Demo de NFSU2 en UE5 es compatible completamente con Linux en Wine/Proton, estoy ejecutándolo bajo Bottles sin problemas en ProtonGE 9-25.

games.name: Jurassic World Evolution 2
games.notes_en: Works with Proton Experimental, may require VKD3D-Proton 2.11 for DirectX Raytracing.
games.notes_es: Funciona con Proton Experimental, puede requerir VKD3D-Proton 2.11 para DirectX Raytracing.

games.name: Kunitsu-Gami: Path of the Goddess
games.notes_en: The game works on Linux with Proton, but some users reported issues with Radeon RX 6600 and 6700 series GPUs. The game requires Proton-GE 10.4 or newer.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona en Linux con Proton, pero algunos usuarios informaron problemas con las series Radeon RX 6600 y 6700. El juego requiere Proton-GE 10.4 o más reciente.

games.name: Layers of Fear
games.notes_en: Setting Steam launch option "-onethread" you can get into gameplay, but the videos/cut-scenes are skipped/do not display.
games.notes_es: Estableciendo la opción de inicio de Steam "-onethread" puedes entrar en el juego, pero los videos/cortes no se muestran.

games.name: Little Nightmares III
games.notes_en: Optimal Graphics Configuration: Ray Tracing: OFF. Setting launch options to '-vkd3d_feature_level=12_1' fixes issues.
games.notes_es: Configuración gráfica óptima: Iluminación por rayos: DESACTIVADA. Establecer las opciones de inicio en '-vkd3d_feature_level=12_1' resuelve problemas.

games.name: Loopmancer
games.notes_en: Use -dx11 launch option and Helix Mod: Unreal Engine 4 Universal Fix.
games.notes_es: Utilice la opción de lanzamiento -dx11 y el Mod Helix: Universal Fix de Unreal Engine 4.

games.name: MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries
games.notes_en: The game runs great on Linux with Proton, no special tweaks needed. Ensure Steam client and Proton are up to date.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona bien en Linux con Proton, sin necesidad de ajustes especiales. Asegúrese de que la aplicación de Steam y Proton estén actualizadas.

games.name: Metro Exodus
games.notes_en: Metro Exodus Enhanced Edition brings a number of updates to the Ray Tracing implementation seen in the initial PC release of Metro Exodus and its subsequent DLCs.
games.notes_es: Metro Exodus Enhanced Edition trae una serie de actualizaciones en la implementación del ray tracing vista en la primera versión de PC de Metro Exodus y sus DLC posteriores.

protondb_configs.notes: Worked fine after I set Windows 8.1 in winecfg

So I recently posted saying this game is borked because it now requires a certain windows patch and if you just launch the game through steam with proton it won't work and will tell you your game has not met the system requirements. Luckily there is a way to fix this. You need to change your wineconfig to 8.1. You need to do this by adding the games directory in terminal like this. WINEPREFIX=/home/xnick26/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/412020/pfx winecfg
You will have to change that li
I changed the prefix to use 8.1 and it worked
Running through Lutris with ge-faudio-protonified-4.8. Cracked verison can run without epic launcher.
Runs perfectly with ge-faudio-protonified-4.8

games.name: Metro Exodus PC Enhanced Edition
games.notes_en: The game allows to skip intro video by pressing E. To always skip them, follow these instructions. Enable manual saving in Ranger mode. The game only saves at certain checkpoints or after sleeping (note the save icon in the bottom right corner).
games.notes_es: El juego permite saltar la introducción presionando E. Para saltar siempre, sigue estas instrucciones. Habilita la guardado manual en modo Ranger. El juego solo guarda en ciertos puntos de control o después de dormir (nota el icono de guardado en la esquina inferior derecha).

protondb_configs.notes: Worked fine after I set Windows 8.1 in winecfg

So I recently posted saying this game is borked because it now requires a certain windows patch and if you just launch the game through steam with proton it won't work and will tell you your game has not met the system requirements. Luckily there is a way to fix this. You need to change your wineconfig to 8.1. You need to do this by adding the games directory in terminal like this. WINEPREFIX=/home/xnick26/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/412020/pfx winecfg
You will have to change that li
I changed the prefix to use 8.1 and it worked
Running through Lutris with ge-faudio-protonified-4.8. Cracked verison can run without epic launcher.
Runs perfectly with ge-faudio-protonified-4.8

games.name: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
games.launch_options: WINEDLLOVERRIDES=urlmon,wininet,mshtml=n,b - Improves compatibility with Wine-based software. PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_NO_FSYNC=1 - Enhances performance by disabling certain sync features
games.notes_en: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 runs on Kubuntu Linux through Steam Proton. It requires a 64-bit processor and operating system, and supports ray tracing (graphics).
games.notes_es: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 se ejecuta en Kubuntu Linux a través de Steam Proton. Requiere un procesador y sistema operativo de 64 bits, y soporta ray tracing (gráficos).

games.notes_en: Works with Proton, but audio issues reported.
games.notes_es: Funciona con Proton, pero problemas de audio reportados.

games.anticheat_linux: anti-cheat prevents it from working at all

games.name: NINJA GAIDEN 2 Black
games.notes_en: Works on Proton, requires Proton Experimental, some users report issues with ray tracing on AMD.
games.notes_es: Funciona en Proton, requiere Proton Experimental, algunos usuarios reportan problemas con la iluminación por rayos en AMD.

games.name: Observer: System Redux
games.notes_en: Uses Proton, latest vkd3d-proton-git & Dx12 ingame API.

games.name: Portal with RTX
games.notes_en: Portal with RTX runs perfectly fine on Linux with Proton, but requires the latest NVIDIA proprietary drivers (418.49.04 or newer) or the Portal RTX AMD mod for AMD GPUs.
games.notes_es: Portal with RTX funciona perfectamente en Linux con Proton, pero requiere los últimos controladores propietarios de NVIDIA (418.49.04 o posterior) o el Portal RTX AMD mod para tarjetas gráficas AMD.

games.name: Portal: Prelude RTX
games.notes_en: Portal: Prelude RTX runs without issues on the default Proton 8.0-104 and relatively ancient nvidia-driver 525.116.03. Edit: Did you set the launch options to enable RT and DLSS?
games.notes_es: Portal: Prelude RTX corre sin problemas con el Proton 8.0-104 y un driver nvidia relativamente antiguo 525.116.03. Edit: ¿Has configurado las opciones de lanzamiento para habilitar RT y DLSS?

games.name: Pumpkin Jack
games.notes_en: Pumpkin Jack is playable with standard proton but cutscenes are not viewable. It works on Steam Deck with a 30% rating on ProtonDB.
games.notes_es: Pumpkin Jack es jugable con proton estándar pero las escenas de corte no son visibles. Funciona en Steam Deck con una calificación del 30% en ProtonDB.

games.name: Quake II RTX
games.notes_en: Quake 2 RTX works out-of-the-box with no need for additional configuration, according to ProtonDB.
games.notes_es: Quake 2 RTX funciona sin necesidad de configuración adicional, según ProtonDB.

games.name: Raji: An Ancient Epic
games.notes_en: Raji: An Ancient Epic is an action-adventure game set in ancient India. A young girl named Raji has been chosen by the gods to stand against the demonic invasion of the human realm.
games.notes_es: Raji: An Ancient Epic es un juego de acción-aventura ambientado en la India antigua. Una joven llamada Raji ha sido elegida por los dioses para enfrentarse a la invasión demoníaca del reino humano.

games.name: Redfall
games.notes_en: Redfall works on Linux with Proton, but some users experience issues with ray tracing.
games.notes_es: Redfall funciona en Linux con Proton, pero algunos usuarios experimentan problemas con la iluminación de rayos.

games.name: Returnal
games.notes_en: Proton Experimental is recommended for optimal performance. Some cutscenes are missing and some placeholders are used to fill the void.
games.notes_es: Se recomienda Proton Experimental para una óptima experiencia de juego. Algunas escenas cortas faltan y algunos rellenos se utilizan para llenar el vacío.

games.name: Riven
games.notes_en: Riven works on Linux with Proton, but may require specific launch options or environment variables.
games.notes_es: Riven funciona en Linux con Proton, pero puede requerir opciones de inicio o variables de entorno específicas.

games.name: STORROR Parkour Pro
games.notes_en: Switching the compatibility tool from the Linux Runtime to a version of Proton forces the Windows version to download and makes it playable. Proton is a revolutionary compatibility layer developed by Valve that enables Linux users to play Windows-based games on their Linux systems.
games.notes_es: Cambiar la herramienta de compatibilidad desde el entorno de ejecución de Linux a una versión de Proton fuerza a descargar la versión de Windows y la hace jugable. Proton es una capa de compatibilidad revolucionaria desarrollada por Valve que permite a los usuarios de Linux jugar juegos basados en Windows en sus sistemas Linux.

games.name: Shadow of the Tomb Raider
games.notes_en: Shadow of the Tomb Raider works on Linux with Proton, but may require Proton Experimental for ray tracing. Some users experience GPU hangs when ray tracing is enabled.
games.notes_es: Shadow of the Tomb Raider funciona en Linux con Proton, pero puede requerir Proton Experimental para el ray tracing. Algunos usuarios experimentan colgues de GPU cuando el ray tracing está habilitado.

protondb_configs.notes: It works fine.

Update to a previous post -  Since the latest proton update, this game not only runs flawlessly for me but there has been almost zero studdering in new areas or during cinematics. Plays almost smooth as butter.

Runs out of the box (ignoring the launcher warning about not finding a video adapter) and plays great most of the time. The game has a few glitches, but those are reported by Windows users as well -- nothing Proton-related.

Have not run into any issues as of yet. So far running flawless with graphic settings set to Highest at 1920x1080. I get between 80 and 100 FPS depending on where I am at in the environment. Typically, only falling to low 80's when things get really busy.  I'm not sure Feral needs to spend time porting this title with as well as it runs in Proton.  Well done Steam. Keep up the great work.

The in-game benchmark shows a throughput between 30 and 60fps at 1440p. Disabling Esync is mandatory for the game to run. Feral Game Mode daemon can optimise the use of both CPUs and GPU for a small (but significant) gain in frame rate.

games.name: Spider-Man 2
games.notes_en: ProtonDB is a site dedicated to compatibility reports for Linux and Steam Deck. Installing and using Proton on Linux opens up a world of Windows-only games to Linux users.
games.notes_es: ProtonDB es un sitio dedicado a informar sobre la compatibilidad de juegos en Linux y Steam Deck. Instalar y usar Proton en Linux abre un mundo de juegos de Windows solo para usuarios de Linux.

games.name: Spider-Man Remastered
games.notes_en: To fix crashes, use PROTON_ENABLE_NVAPI=1 VKD3D_CONFIG=dxr11 %command%. FSR4 works on Linux now for this game.
games.notes_es: Para solucionar los errores, utilice PROTON_ENABLE_NVAPI=1 VKD3D_CONFIG=dxr11 %command%. FSR4 funciona en Linux ahora para este juego.

games.name: Steelrising
games.notes_en: Steelrising works on Linux with Proton, but may require specific launch options or environment variables. Some users report issues with high-end hardware.
games.notes_es: Steelrising funciona en Linux con Proton, pero puede requerir opciones de inicio o variables de entorno específicas. Algunos usuarios informan problemas con hardware de alta gama.

games.name: Sword and Fairy 7
games.notes_en: The game has compatibility issues on Debian, but it can be fixed by using SteamOS.
games.notes_es: El juego tiene problemas de compatibilidad en Debian, pero se pueden solucionar utilizando SteamOS.

protondb_configs.notes: SP works fine but not able to run MP as get prompted for PunkBuster to install/update but receive error "PunkBuster not running"
I have no issue's with this game. I posted a steamcommunity video at: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t5fOEK6pQ5g&feature=youtu.be
runs perfectly out of the box
No issues playing Single Player - punkbuster failed to install but didn't prevent game launching.

You need to downgrade the game from 1.8 to 1.7 or you'll have very few servers, url: https://cod4x.me/index.php?/forums/topic/2622-steam-cod4-patch-breaks-game-our-official-repair-guide/
The PunkBuster installation fail. This is not important most servers don't use it. If it is needed see comments below.

Installing Media Foundation libraries is required. Otherwise the game gets stuck in the splash screen. ProtonDB text formatting isn't great, so instructions are on Steam: https://steamcommunity.com/app/428660/discussions/0/1735468061764944319/#c3175526477767880551
Game is free of glitches and errors, performance is degraded at certain times but could play game through from start to finish

Faking GPU information to get better performance on nvidia. Into steam launch options:
DXVK_CONFIG_FILE="/path/to/dxvk.conf" %command%
contents of the file:
dxgi.customDeviceId = E366
dxgi.customVendorId = 1002
2560x1440 all Epic, resolution scale 100%, 50-120 fps, mostly around 70 on Earth and around 80 on SpaceStation, haven't reached to the Moon yet. Has some heavy stutters when loading new scenery, sometimes freezes for 1-2 sec

Game runs flawlessly, FPS was very smooth and my Xbox One controller worked great with the game (including rumble feedback). You will need to install the Media Foundation tweak to get cutscenes to work properly otherwise the game will crash anytime a cutscene is shown (basically this workaround is MANDATORY as you won't be able to make it very far into the game otherwise). Here's a step-by-step guide, it's really not too difficult:

Step 1. Download RE2: Remake in Steam (if you haven't already).

I used (https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install) for install Media Foundation, WINEPREFIX="/home/your name/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/883710/pfx" /home/your name/mf-install/install-mf.sh Game works perfect!
Ran around in the garage, watched two cutscenes, shot a few zombie dogs. Minimal hiccuping from quick turns with the mouse.
Game runs perfectly.  https://youtu.be/hPx3GLaHuzI

Follow the instruction here: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1654060648&searchtext=linux
You must to do it step by step.
After install Media Foundation libraries, RE7 still can crash randomly when shows the intro movie, but then when you are in game, everything run perfectly.
Game runs very good.You need to do a lot of tweaks in order to be able to play the game   https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk/issues/728#issuecomment-459839962

Haven't tested full gameplay, but thus far it's been running well. Required MF workaround as mentioned in other reports. In previous installs I experienced a few crashes before some cutscenes that couldn't be reproduced after playing those cutscenes again. Latest install appears to be running crashless. Performance is fine, although slightly worse than Windows install and setting shadows to Very High causes way too big of a performance hit.

Work nice after fixes. Need to install DXVK 0.95 or higher, and ms wmf from here https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk/issues/728#issuecomment-459839962 (instructions included). High fps without freezes on ultra-settings

You need to do a lot of tweaks in order to be able to play the game

https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk/issues/728#issuecomment-459839962

games.name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered

protondb_configs.notes: Works with mods as well. Just perfect my dudes.

Runs as good or possibly even better than on Windows. Only problem is that in order to make the 4 mods that I use work, I have to copy the file `x64.final.redscripts` from content0 on my old Windows installation to the corresponding Linux folder, every 24 hours.
Runs perfectly with two mods (over 9000 weight and quests obj on map).
No problems what-so-ever. Performance is solid.
No issues, great performance on max settings. Even added some mods copied from my Windows installation.

EAC isn't implemented yet, which means you can still play the game through Proton. Using these options, you don't need to set your config.blk file as read-only: 
gamemoderun "/mx500/SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/War Thunder/win64/aces.exe" %command% -safe -NoLauncher -noeac -forcestart -driver:vulkan

No additonal tweaks required. Works great out of the box with latest proton version. Only one bug occurs: you can't close the game normally, it will freeze. You have to use a task manager to kill it instead of shutting it down the normal way.
Works perfectly with dxvk. No anti cheat issues.
Worked flawlessly in game. Loading menu occasionally lags a tiny bit.
When using proton with this game is a real performance boost! And when running native I often have sound issue's. I posted a steamcommunity video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d7FW2VRCvFA

games.name: Wolfenstein: Youngblood
games.launch_options: Radeon VII user listen!  RADV with LLVM or ACO both have very low frame-rate and are unplayable even on ultra what is far from the highest setting. Install AMDs AMDVLK and set the launch command to "VK_ICD_FILENAMES="/etc/vulkan/icd.d/amd_icd64.json"  %command%

protondb_configs.notes: Game works pretty cool, but I had to limit the game to 144fps otherwise the game had some severe framedrops
runs perfect and super smooth
Ran rock solid on 1080p with over 70 fps, game crashed once after first boss battle but smooth sailing after restarting it once.
Runs great. Had a one-time crash during full play-through.
Out of the Box ;)

Absolutely no tweaks or configuration needed, ran full-screen at high settings with performance seemingly equivalent to Windows (by sight and feel, not measured). No graphical, audio or input errors encountered. Note: Did NOT test the VR mode, only tested the regular mode with keyboard and mouse.

games.name: The Ascent
games.notes_en: Proton bundles modern Wine improvements, DXVK/vkd3d translation layers, and targeted patches to support game launchers, anti-cheat workarounds (where possible), and APIs that used to be Windows.
games.notes_es: Proton agrupa mejoras modernas de Wine, capas de traducción DXVK/vkd3d y parches dirigidos para apoyar lanzadores de juegos, soluciones de anti-cheat (donde sea posible) y APIs que solían ser de Windows.

games.name: The Outer Worlds 2
games.notes_en: The game runs flawlessly on Linux using default Steam settings and Proton. Ultra settings stable, no tweaks needed.
games.notes_es: El juego se ejecuta sin problemas en Linux utilizando los ajustes de Steam por defecto y Proton. Configuración Ultra estable, sin ajustes necesarios.

games.name: The Talos Principle: Reawakened
games.notes_en: The game takes a 20% fps hit in Linux, but it's playable.
games.notes_es: El juego toma un 20% de pérdida de FPS en Linux, pero es jugable.

games.name: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
games.notes_en: Proton is not a program that 'launches'. It is a compatibility layer / mechanism that the game uses to make API calls to the operating system.
games.notes_es: Proton no es un programa que 'inicia'. Es una capa de compatibilidad / mecanismo que el juego utiliza para hacer llamadas a la API del sistema operativo.

games.name: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines 2
games.notes_en: The game works pretty well, not perfect, can install the patches by adding the patch installers to Steam as non Steam games and forcing Proton. If you only play campaign with Proton or Proton-6.9-GE-2, it will work fine.
games.notes_es: El juego funciona bastante bien, no perfecto, puede instalar las actualizaciones agregando los instaladores de actualizaciones a Steam como juegos no de Steam y forzando Proton. Si solo juegas la campaña con Proton o Proton-6.9-GE-2, funcionará correctamente.

games.name: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide
games.notes_en: Proton 9.0 has another Beta release fixing DEATHLOOP and Warhammer 40,000: Darktide. Linux launch options and environment variables: LD_PRELOAD=""
games.notes_es: Proton 9.0 tiene otra versión beta que arregla DEATHLOOP y Warhammer 40,000: Darktide. Opciones de inicio de Linux y variables de entorno: LD_PRELOAD=""

games.name: Xuan-Yuan Sword VII
games.notes_en: Works with the default Proton version, but each bootup asks to install Microsoft Visual C++
games.notes_es: Funciona con la versión de Proton por defecto, pero cada arranque pide instalar Microsoft Visual C++
